note: Introducing watcher-driven client refresh with safe fallback and invalidation rules.
Client consumes watcher-driven change notifications and falls back via watcher-status SSE payloads. Committed in 08deb7e.

criteria_satisfied: fallback contract implemented via SSE payloads
